shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch mascot beside a Loom recording interface with a share link extending to multiple recipients, illustrating the product-led growth mechanism.
assets.caption: Hatch mascot beside a Loom recording interface with a share link extending to multiple recipients, illustrating the product-led growth mechanism.
assets.prompt: Loom | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with graduation cap and growth arrow) standing next to a large video recording interface. A visible "Share" button glows on the recording, and a link URL extends outward like a thread connecting to multiple recipient icons. Hatch's expression is calm and knowing. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch gesturing from a cluttered meeting calendar to a simple video recording window, illustrating async video as a meeting replacement.
assets.caption: Hatch gesturing from a cluttered meeting calendar to a simple video recording window, illustrating async video as a meeting replacement.
assets.prompt: Loom | hatch-narrator: Hatch in narrator stance, gesturing toward a cluttered calendar view on one side and a simple video recording window on the other. The gesture suggests "this replaces that." Cream background, no speech bubble. Hatch is slightly turned, pointing at the recording window. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1600x1600. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. assets.alt: Hatch examining the Loom acquisition loop — from recording through link share to viewer becoming a new sender.
assets.caption: Hatch examining the Loom acquisition loop — from recording through link share to viewer becoming a new sender.
assets.prompt: Loom | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at a simple flow diagram: Record → Generate link → Recipient views → Recipient records reply → New Loom user. Each step is a simple icon connected by arrows. Hatch points to the last step — the recipient becoming a sender. Cream background, no copy. Watermark same as hero. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
